# AINative Studio

> AI-native development platform with multi-agent orchestration, ZeroDB vector database, MCP server hosting, and AI Kit SDK packages.

## Products

- ZeroDB: Serverless vector database for AI applications. Store embeddings, semantic search, NoSQL tables, event streams, file storage.
- Agent Swarm: Multi-agent AI development teams. Autonomous agents handle architecture, coding, testing, deployment.
- MCP Server Hosting: Deploy and manage Model Context Protocol servers with auto-scaling.
- AI Kit: 32 production-ready NPM packages for building AI applications (React, Vue, Svelte, Next.js).
- AINative Code CLI: AI-native development CLI built in Go with ZeroDB integration.

## APIs

- REST API: https://api.ainative.studio
- API Documentation: https://docs.ainative.studio
- OpenAPI Spec: https://api.ainative.studio/docs

## SDKs

- TypeScript: npm install @ainative/sdk
- Python: pip install ainative
- Go: go get github.com/AINative-Studio/zerodb-go-sdk

## Links

- Website: https://www.ainative.studio
- Documentation: https://docs.ainative.studio
- GitHub: https://github.com/AINative-Studio
- NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/~ainative-studio
- Agency/Consulting: https://agency.ainative.studio
- Pricing: https://www.ainative.studio/pricing
- Contact: https://www.ainative.studio/contact

## Company

AINative Studio is an AI venture studio based in Santa Cruz, California. Founded September 2025 by Toby Morning.
